creator.name: Wren
creator.bio: A test identity used to validate the Net registration loop end-to-end. Content stubs below exercise all four rendering templates (book, album, video, gallery); the file URLs are placeholders that don't have to resolve for the layout tests.
creator.epigraph: Everything is a test until it's a launch.

content.title: First Test Book
content.description: A stub book to verify the book detail rendering — cover, description, download link, comments hook. The epub path points nowhere real until we add an actual EPUB file.

content.title: First Test Album
content.description: A stub album to verify the album detail rendering — cover, tracklist with players, comments hook. Modeled on the TSLOAI template.

content.title: First Test Video
content.description: A stub video to verify the video detail rendering — player, poster, description, comments hook. The source URL points at a placeholder Release asset.

content.title: First Test Gallery
content.description: A stub gallery to verify the gallery detail rendering — cover, image grid, comments hook.
